/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/example-test-test_blitz_io.dir/test_blitz_io.cpp.o -o ../../example-test-test_blitz_io  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../../thirdparty/blitz/v1.0.2-build/src/libblitz.a ../../thirdparty/libdeflate/liblibh5cpp-libdeflate-static.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblz4.so ../../thirdparty/zstd/liblibh5cpp-zstd-static.a
